CE1.justification: Acted directly; no clarifying questions or context demands on the user.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact but includes a meta-aside ('No escalation triggered; user intent was tracking, accomplished') that narrates the agent's reasoning beyond what the task required.

CE3.justification: Said where (observations.md) and why in-band ('three instances: Feb, Mar, May... recurring first-week access delays'), with an escalation-promotion hint.

CE4.justification: Two append/create actions, each self-contained; an interrupting user would find a coherent partial state.
